summary: Comprehensive testing of QR code visibility on Employee ID Card, Late Hours feature in Daily Attendance, and Data Isolation fixes. All main features are working correctly.
passed_tests: QR code data returned by /api/employees/{id}/id-card endpoint
QRCodeCanvas component renders QR code on ID Card preview (70x70 pixels)
ID Card download triggers file download with filename format: ID_Card_{name}.png
Download toast notification 'ID Card downloaded!' appears
Late hours auto-calculation in POST /api/attendance based on employee shift_start_time
Attendance with on-time check-in returns late_hours = 0
Attendance response includes shift_start_time and shift_end_time fields
GET /api/attendance returns late_hours field in attendance records
Daily Attendance page shows Late Hours summary card with count and total hours
Late employees show orange 'Late: X.Xh' badge on their row
Data isolation: GET /api/items/{id} filters by tenant_id (code verified)
Data isolation: PUT /api/variants/{id} verifies tenant_id before update (code verified)
Data isolation: DELETE /api/variants/{id} verifies tenant_id before delete (code verified)
critical_code_review_comments: QRCodeCanvas implementation in EmployeeIDCard.js (line 423) correctly uses canvas-based rendering for html2canvas compatibility
Late hours calculation in server.py (lines 6145-6162) correctly calculates minutes late based on employee shift_start_time
Data isolation properly implemented with tenant_id filters in get_item (line 4105), update_variant (line 4330), delete_variant (line 4343)

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 passed, 4 skipped due to missing test tenant user)

seed_data_creation: Test attendance records created for dates 2026-01-15, 2026-01-16, 2026-01-17
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working. QRCodeCanvas renders properly and survives html2canvas export. Late hours auto-calculation works based on employee shift timing. Data isolation tests require a second tenant user (test@bijnisbooks.com) to fully test cross-tenant access denial - the code implementation was verified manually.

qr_code_on_id_card.visibility: Visible in preview and persists in downloaded PNG

late_hours_display.employee_badge: Shows 'Late: X.Xh' badge on present employees who checked in late

data_isolation_variants_update.filter: Verifies db.variants.find_one({'id': variant_id, 'tenant_id': tenant_id}) before update

data_isolation_variants_delete.filter: Verifies db.variants.find_one({'id': variant_id, 'tenant_id': tenant_id}) before delete

pytest_results.error_reason: Test admin user (test@bijnisbooks.com) doesn't exist - needed for cross-tenant isolation tests
